turn_info.content: I'm, okay, thanks, and you?  I'm feeling a bit down because I'm alone for the holidays.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes, my family is scattered all over the country, like Seattle, Georgia, PA.  I'm sure I'm not the only one with no plans this weekend, though.

results.term: No.  My nearby friends all went away for the holid...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: No.  My nearby friends all went away for the holidays.  I could probably just occupy my time with things I need or want to do in order to distract myself.

results.term: I'm teaching myself the piano.  I'm also teaching ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'm teaching myself the piano.  I'm also teaching myself  how to work a stenography machine for possible future employment as a stenographer.  I also like to read novels.

results.term: Yeah, it's pretty cool.  For example, if I hit DRA...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yeah, it's pretty cool.  For example, if I hit DRAT in one stroke, then "Did there come a time" will appear in English on my machine's  LCD screen.

results.term: Each stenographer has their own "Personal Dictiona...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Each stenographer has their own "Personal Dictionary" which is a list of words in English along with how you in particular write out those words or phrases in steno.  This dictionary is present within the actual steno machine after you transfer it from your laptop to the machine via cable or wifi.  Thus your machine then knows how you write out words in particular and how to translate those words from steno to English - each stenographer writes a little differently.

results.term: Yes, exactly!  And it's very important to back up ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes, exactly!  And it's very important to back up your personal dictionary to the cloud or a seperate drive so that you don't lose it in a hard-drive crash.  A lot of work goes into creating that dictionary!  No, it's happened before, being along for the holidays; but you've helped to cheer me up, so thanks!

results.term: You have, thanks!  Did you do anything special?

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: You have, thanks!  Did you do anything special?
